scripts.diagram: npm run diagram:simple && npm run diagram:detailed && npm run diagram:flow
scripts.diagram:simple: npx -y -p @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli -p puppeteer mmdc -i architecture/simple.mmd -o architecture/simple.png -b white -s 2
scripts.diagram:detailed: npx -y -p @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli -p puppeteer mmdc -i architecture/detailed.mmd -o architecture/detailed.png -b white -s 2
scripts.diagram:flow: npx -y -p @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli -p puppeteer mmdc -i architecture/flow.mmd -o architecture/flow.png -b white -s 2
scripts.assets:submodule: git submodule update --init && git -C vendor/cockatrice sparse-checkout set --no-cone libcockatrice_protocol/
scripts.prepare: npm run assets:submodule && npm run -w @cockatrice/sockatrice proto:generate && npm run -w @cockatrice/webatrice prebuild && husky
